chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ زِيَارَةِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 232 – Merits of the Ziyarah of Abu Abdullah Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/309)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/309)
text: قَالَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) أَدْنَى مَا يُثَابُ بِهِ زَائِرُ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) بِشَطِّ الْفُرَاتِ إِذَا عَرَفَ حَقَّهُ وَ حُرْمَتَهُ وَ وَلَايَتَهُ أَنْ يُغْفَرَ لَهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْ ذَنْبِهِ وَ مَا تَأَخَّرَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Kahybari, from Al Husayn Bin Muhammad who said,

‘Abu Al-Hassan Musaasws said: ‘The lowest of what the performer of a Ziyarah of Abu Abdullahasws by the banks of the Euphrates is Rewarded with when he recognises his right, and hisasws sanctity, and hisasws Wilayah that Heazwj would Forgive for him whatever had preceded from his sins and what is delayed’.
en.sarwar: 9. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn Isma‘il from al-Khaybariy from al-Husayn ibn Muhammad who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, Musa, Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The least of rewards that a visitor of abu ‘Abd Allah, Alayhi al-Salam, near al-Furat canal, will receive, when he has proper understanding of his rights, sacred status, his possessing authority from Allah, is forgiveness of his past sins and that which come later.’”
